content.en:
Lost in time and space.

A small golden tree is rooted in a region of time and space that has been lost in time and space.

At first, Ye Tian didn't notice this small tree, and it was only after approaching that he saw it.

This is still a space-time glow fish suitable for wandering in lost time and space, and the perception is far away, if the real body copies the body, I am afraid that it will not be discovered.

This small tree has dozens of leaves on it, and the trunk of the small tree is very thin and thin.

Ye Tian immediately went up and plucked off the pieces of Lost Golden Leaves, and this small tree, he tried to pull it out, but found that it couldn't be pulled, as if it was completely integrated with the Lost Time and Space, unless it could shake the entire Lost Time and Space, he couldn't get it away.

The gold leaf can be easily picked if it is lost.

"Dozens of lost gold leaves, now you don't have to worry about losing gold leaves!"

He immediately began to condense his true body and replicate his body.

Soon, the real body copy body was successfully condensed, and he entered the Lost Domain with these Lost Gold Leaves.

With these Lost Gold Leaves, even if he fell dozens of times, the impact would not be great.

"I've found the Lost Golden Leaf so easily, those legendary Dao Realms, even if it's a little harder to find, but it's not impossible to find them. It seems that the value of the Lost Golden Leaf is not high, it's just that those Legendary Dao Realm elders deliberately restricted the outflow of the Lost Golden Leaf, and that's it. Ye Tian said darkly.

He also understands better, after all, even if there is a large outflow, not many Ninefold Dao Realms dare to enter the Lost Domain!

So, they simply limit the outflow.

"No wonder the Ancient Emperor of Longyan casually took out a piece of Lost Gold Leaf, he estimated that he found a lot of powerful Supreme Dao Realm, and all of them sent out a Lost Golden Leaf, if there is really a Supreme Dao Realm to get back Longyan Lin Stone, he is all earned by blood, and what he paid is just a Lost Golden Leaf that is useless to him. "

Ye Tian muttered.

......

"This is Longyan Linshi!"

Ye Tian was somewhere underground in the Lost Domain and found this relatively large Longyan Lin Stone.

Longyan Linshi is a very good person, the appearance is a cyan stone, but there are dense scales, like carving, in fact, it is natural.

And this stone is extremely tough, but it contains a strange energy.

"This stone is three cubes, and it seems that it is not difficult to get together a hundred cubes!"

Ye Tian continued to search around here, and sure enough, he found more than a dozen Longyan Lin Stones, reaching a total of forty-three cubic meters.

However, he didn't have much excitement, after all, it was just a dragon rock lin stone, not the fourth sequence of supreme path rule items he needed.

However, there are many wonderful materials in the Lost Realm, some of which he doesn't recognize, but he has collected them, and maybe they will be of great use in the future.

After finding a lot of material resources, he will choose to send them to another copy body to ensure that the things are not lost.

Otherwise, if this replica body had fallen, it might have been gone.

Time flickered, and several solstice eras passed.

At this time, Ye Tian had collected a lot of good things, and a hundred cubic meters of Longyan Lin Stone had already been collected.

It's a pity that he still hasn't found the Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule item.

"Gotta go deep into the Lost Realm!"

Ye Tian decided.

On this day, he headed for the more dangerous depths of the Lost Realm.

As soon as he entered the depths of the Lost Realm, he encountered a terrifying creature.

Rumble!!!

A legendary-level creature similar to the appearance of the Golden-winged Dapeng appeared, directly attacking and killing Ye Tian.

Ye Tian went all out and responded with the fourth sequence of supreme rules, but the other party's body was also filled with the power of the fourth sequence supreme rules, and the realm was not low, and he directly broke through Ye Tian's defense with one claw.

Immediately, the other party's eyes released a ray of light, directly piercing his body.

This moment.

Ye Tian was directly hit hard.

In the next second, a golden wave of light shrouded him, directly shattering his body.

This replica body has been killed!

"What a terrifying golden-winged Gu Peng!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

The strength of the other party should be comparable to the Legendary Dao Realm, otherwise it would be absolutely impossible to kill him so easily.

"The Lost Domain also has such a terrifying strength of the Legendary Dao Realm creatures, it is estimated that only if I cultivate to break through to the Ninefold Dao Realm, or comprehend the rules of the Third Sequence Dao Dao, can I fight against it!" Ye Tian estimated.

However, he did not give up and he was ready to explore other areas.

He didn't believe that he would encounter other legendary creatures.

Sure enough, after he explored other places, he was not so unlucky.

One precious resource after another was found by him and sent back.

And on this day, he finally found a fourth-sequence supreme rule item.

"This is the fourth sequence of Supreme Dao rule items - Teng Snake Ancient Mother Gold!"

Teng Snake Ancient Mother Gold, just like a snake, contains a powerful Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule Origin inside, and the quality has reached the top level, with only one side effect, that is, it will be weak for a period of time.

The top-quality fourth-order Supreme Dao Rule items are enough to make countless Ninefold Supreme Dao Realms crazy!

It can be said that such a piece of Teng Snake Ancient Mother Gold is enough to create an ordinary legendary Dao realm powerhouse.

"Take!"

Ye Tian took this piece of Teng Snake Ancient Mother Gold and sent it to another copy body.

"Go out first, so that you can keep this piece of the fourth sequence Supreme Dao rule item!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

He obtained this fourth sequence supreme path rule item, he was not ready to refine, he was ready to trade with other forces.

He believed that many forces were willing to trade low-quality fourth-order supreme rule items with him for this piece of Teng Snake Ancient Mother Gold.

Airplanes.

Lost in time and space.

Ye Tian came out.

Subsequently.

His replica body returns to the Winter Night Fortress.

After some time, he returned.

As soon as possible, he contacted Su Ya.

The Supreme Void.

Ye Tian and Su Ya met.

"Lord Su Domain, there is a business, I don't know if you Su people are willing to do it?"

Ye Tian smiled.

"What business?" Su Ya was curious.

"I have a piece of Teng Snake Ancient Mother Gold in my hand!" Ye Tian said.

"The top-quality fourth-order supreme rule item, the vine snake ancient mother gold, is only weak for a long time after refining, which is a good thing. Su Ya was shocked.

Who doesn't want such a good thing?

She no longer lacked fourth-order Supreme Dao Rule items, but a piece of Teng Snake Ancient Mother Gold was enough for the Su Clan to give birth to an ordinary Legendary Dao Realm powerhouse.

"What do you want to change?"

Su Ya knew very well that Ye Tian would definitely not take it out and trade it casually, and he would inevitably need something from the Su family.

"I need more Fourth Sequence Supreme Rule items, regardless of quality, even low-quality. Ye Tian made his own request.
